docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,771.77 FILED BY ENCARNACION, ARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT HOTWIRE.COM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENCARNACION, ARLENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOTWIRE.COM $2,681.77 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,741.77, THE DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $668.83, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF APPEARS IN PRO PER. ALLISUN KENT APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: B. PAREDES, NOT REPORTED (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOTWIRE.COM
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HOTWIRE.COM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED - SEE CERTIFIED MAIL RECEIPT) SERVED APR-03-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOTWIRE.COM
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCARNACION, ARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT HOTWIRE.COM
